errcheck.description: Unchecked error returns - detects when error values are not checked
errcheck.fix: Check error return values or explicitly ignore with _ = err. Common pattern: if err != nil { return err }
errcheck.example:
resp, err := http.Get(url)
// Must check: if err != nil { return err }

gosec.description: Security vulnerabilities - identifies potential security issues
gosec.fix: Review security issue and apply recommended fix. Common issues: weak crypto, command injection, SQL injection

govet.description: Suspicious constructs - reports constructs that look like bugs
govet.fix: Review code logic and fix reported issue. Common issues: printf format mismatches, unreachable code, suspicious comparisons

staticcheck.description: Static analysis issues - advanced code analysis for bugs and performance
staticcheck.fix: Follow staticcheck recommendations for code improvements. Usually indicates real bugs or inefficiencies

ineffassign.description: Ineffectual assignments - detects assignments to existing variables that are never used
ineffassign.fix: Remove the ineffectual assignment or use the variable. Often indicates dead code
ineffassign.example:
x := 5
x = 10  // If x is never used after this, it's ineffectual

unused.description: Unused code - detects unused constants, variables, functions, and types
unused.fix: Remove unused code or use it. Helps keep codebase clean

gocritic.description: Opinionated code quality checks - suggests improvements and simplifications
gocritic.fix: Review suggestion and apply if it improves code quality. Often suggests simpler or more idiomatic Go

bodyclose.description: HTTP response body not closed - detects HTTP response bodies that are not properly closed
bodyclose.fix: Add defer resp.Body.Close() after checking error from HTTP request

errorlint.description: Error wrapping issues - detects incorrect error wrapping patterns
errorlint.fix: Use fmt.Errorf with %w for wrapping errors, %v for non-wrapping. Use errors.Is/As for checking wrapped errors

forbidigo.description: Forbidden function/pattern usage - detects use of forbidden functions
forbidigo.fix: Replace forbidden function with approved alternative. Common: fmt.Println → logger, panic → error return

goconst.description: Repeated string/numeric constants - suggests defining constants for repeated values
goconst.fix: Define a constant for repeated values to improve maintainability

misspell.description: Misspelled words in code - detects common spelling mistakes

whitespace.description: Unnecessary whitespace - detects unnecessary blank lines
whitespace.fix: Remove extra blank lines. Usually at start/end of blocks

goimports.description: Import formatting issues - detects improperly formatted or missing imports

gci.description: Import ordering issues - detects imports not in standard order
gci.fix: Run: make goimports to fix import ordering (stdlib, external, local)

revive.description: Linting issues - general purpose linter with many rules
revive.fix: Review specific revive rule and apply suggested fix

typecheck.description: Type checking errors - detects type errors that prevent compilation
typecheck.fix: Fix type errors - usually indicates incorrect type usage or missing imports

nilnil.description: Returning nil, nil - detects functions returning both nil values
nilnil.fix: Return meaningful error instead of nil, nil. Pattern: return nil, fmt.Errorf("not found")

nilerr.description: Returning nil error with non-nil value - detects suspicious error returns
nilerr.fix: Ensure error is non-nil when returning error condition

gofmt.description: Code formatting issues - detects code not formatted with gofmt

gofumpt.description: Stricter gofmt - enforces more strict formatting rules
gofumpt.fix: Run: gofumpt -w . or make goimports if gofumpt is configured

unconvert.description: Unnecessary type conversions - detects redundant type conversions
unconvert.example: int(x) where x is already int

unparam.description: Unused function parameters - detects parameters that are never used
unparam.fix: Remove unused parameter or use _ if required by interface

gosimple.description: Code simplification suggestions - suggests simpler code alternatives
gosimple.fix: Apply suggested simplification to improve code readability

durationcheck.description: Duration multiplication issues - detects incorrect duration multiplications
durationcheck.fix: Use time.Duration constants correctly: time.Second, time.Millisecond, etc.

exhaustive.description: Exhaustive switch/map - ensures all enum values are handled
exhaustive.fix: Add missing cases to switch statement or add default case

exportloopref.description: Loop variable captured by reference - detects loop variable reference bugs
exportloopref.fix: Create local copy of loop variable before using in closure/goroutine

noctx.description: Missing context.Context - detects HTTP requests without context

rowserrcheck.description: SQL rows.Err() not checked - detects unchecked SQL iteration errors
rowserrcheck.example:
for rows.Next() { ... }
if err := rows.Err(); err != nil { return err }

sqlclosecheck.description: SQL rows/stmt not closed - detects unclosed database resources
sqlclosecheck.fix: Add defer rows.Close() or defer stmt.Close()

wastedassign.description: Wasted assignment - detects assignments that are overwritten before use
wastedassign.fix: Remove the wasted assignment or fix the logic
